# Psalms 111

## Verses (10)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Let the Lord be praised. I will give praise to the Lord with all my heart, among the upright, and in the meeting of the people. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | The works of the Lord are great, searched out by all those who have delight in them. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | His work is full of honour and glory; and his righteousness is unchanging for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | Certain for ever is the memory of his wonders: the Lord is full of pity and mercy. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | He has given food to his worshippers; he will keep his agreement in mind for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | He has made clear to his people the power of his works, giving them the heritage of the nations. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | The works of his hands are faith and righteousness; all his laws are unchanging. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | They are fixed for ever and ever, they are done in faith and righteousness. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | He has sent salvation to his people; he has given his word for ever: holy is his name and greatly to be feared. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | The fear of the Lord is the best part of wisdom: all those who keep his laws are wise: his praise is eternal. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |

<!-- END AUTO-INDEX -->
